description: The `gh` for Forgejo — works with any instance, stores your data locally, and speaks Forgejo natively.

novel_features.name: Multi-repo triage dashboard
novel_features.description: See all your open issues across every repo (and every Forgejo host) in one sorted table — no browser, no tab-switching.

novel_features.name: Unified notification inbox (cross-host)
novel_features.description: One inbox for all your Forgejo instances — Codeberg, company Forgejo, university instance — sorted by recency with a host column.

novel_features.name: Runner health sweep (cross-org)
novel_features.description: See the status of every Actions runner across all your orgs in one pass — flag offline runners, watch live with --watch.

novel_features.name: Release changelog generation
novel_features.description: Auto-generate a grouped changelog between two tags from closed issues and merged PRs — label-grouped, markdown or JSON output.

novel_features.name: Release upload with progress and retry
novel_features.description: Upload release assets with a real progress bar, automatic retry on failure, and post-upload size verification — not silent curl.

novel_features.name: Stale issue sweeper
novel_features.description: Find issues with no activity past a threshold, label them, post a comment, and optionally close — with --dry-run and confirmation before acting.

novel_features.name: PR review queue
novel_features.description: Your pending reviews across all repos in one view — PRs where you are a requested reviewer, with CI check status and approval counts.

novel_features.name: CI check status summary
novel_features.description: Pass/fail status of the latest CI run per repo (or per branch) across all watched repos, with --watch for live tailing.
